title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 631.102 - Methadone treatment programs, department to develop criteria to locate
text:
631.102.  Methadone treatment programs, department to develop criteria to locate. — The department of mental health shall develop criteria for locating new methadone treatment programs in the state of Missouri.
(L. 1997 H.B. 635 § 1, subsec. 6)
